nodes.name: 大分水岭
nodes.summary: 大分水岭是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括White-throated nightjar、Powerful owl、绿宝石鹦鹉等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Brown-headed honeyeater
nodes.summary: Brown-headed honeyeater（Brown-headed honeyeater，学名 Melithreptus brevirostris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于大分水岭。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The brown-headed honeyeater ranges from central-southern Queensland, down through central and eastern New South Wales (though generally west of the Great Dividing Range), across Victoria and into eastern South Australia, where it is found in the Flinders Ranges, around the lower Murray River region, and also on the Eyre Peninsula
